summary: Investigator correctly aborted on a non-runnable repo and identified a plausible mask-token suppression bias, but left three candidate defects un-ratified and could not produce a metric delta.

payload.summary: Investigator correctly aborted on a non-runnable repo and identified a plausible mask-token suppression bias, but left three candidate defects un-ratified and could not produce a metric delta.

checks.label: hypothesis_coverage
checks.note: Four hypotheses span loss-function bias (h1), loss-weight bug (h2), commented-out hybrid path (h3), and fixture availability (h4) — a reasonable span for a scaling-law repo with no small fixture.

checks.label: evidence_quality
checks.note: Each factual claim is tied to a specific file:line citation (loss.py:85, schedule.py:158–197/488–498, tests/test_schedule.py:607, schedule.py:443) and the JAX-absence claim is supported by an actual `python -c 'import jax'` failure.

checks.label: fix_minimality
checks.note: No fix was applied; the investigator correctly honored the contract's requirement that `## Metric delta:` must show a real before→after number before writing code.

checks.label: causal_link
checks.note: No metric delta was produced, so causal-link assessment is vacuous for the primary hypothesis; the investigator's own estimate of h1's effect size (≈2·10⁻⁵ of probability mass) is acknowledged as speculative.

checks.label: alternative_explanations
checks.note: Remaining-uncertainty section explicitly raises alternatives for h2 (broadcasting, dtype, clip-floor interaction) and notes possible sha-drift in the unpinned EasyDeL/eformer forks as an alternative to any codebase-vs-paper discrepancy.

checks.label: uncertainty_honesty
checks.note: Five substantive limitations are listed (no Python executed, unverified h1 magnitude, un-traced h2 at batch shape, un-read main_gpu.py default config, uncontrolled fork sha drift) — genuine rather than boilerplate.

checks.label: suggested_followup
checks.note: Highest-value follow-up: add a conditional `if prior_distribution != Priors.UNIFORM` guard to loss.py:85 and run a 1-step ~25M-param forward pass at vocab=50257 to measure the PPL delta on uniform diffusion — this is the one check that would promote h1 from static-read to ratified.
